name: docx_style
description: List, define, or apply named styles in one consolidated tool. Call op 'list' first — it reports the resolved cascade (based_on chains) — before defining a new style or applying one to a paragraph.

anchor.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Target paragraph for op 'apply'.

style.description: Style name or id to apply (op 'apply').

based_on.description: Existing style the new definition inherits from (op 'define').

props.description: Formatting properties for op 'define': color, bold, italic, size, alignment, spacing_before, spacing_after, etc.

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
